title: Addition Basics
subtitle: Adding Numbers Up to 20
subject: math

vocabulary.definition: The answer you get when you add two or more numbers together.
Any number that is being added in an addition problem.
Means the same amount as. Shown with the = sign.

activities.instruction: Solve each addition problem. Write the sum in the blank.
Match each addition problem to its correct sum.

parentNotes: Practice counting objects around the house to reinforce addition concepts. Use buttons, blocks, or snacks as counters!
